---
title: "Studies"
lang: en
language: ../../assets/language-en.yml
toc-title: "On this page"
---

This page lists currently summarized BMAA-related studies from newest to oldest. Each card highlights the study direction, key outcomes, and the draft figure currently available.

::: {.study-card-grid}

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">From body to mind: BMAA enhances body awareness, mindfulness, positive embodiment and mental health</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2026 · Tien, Y.-M., Lin, C.-Y., Lien, Y.-W., & Hsu, L.-C.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2026-tien-healthcare-students.png" alt="Mental health increased">
<p>BMAA helped healthcare students become more aware of their bodies and improve mental health and life satisfaction.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2026-tien-healthcare-students.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">From the body to the mind: interoception and sense of agency as mechanisms of depression reduction</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2026 · Lien, Y.-W., Teng, S.-C., & Wei, L.-Y.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2026-lien-depression-agency.png" alt="Depression decreased">
<p>BMAA helped university students reduce depression by strengthening body awareness and a sense of personal control.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2026-lien-depression-agency.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">Effects of BMAA combined with lucid-dream therapy on nightmares and sleep quality</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2024 · Chiu, C.-H.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2024-chiu-nightmare-lucid-dream.png" alt="Nightmare distress decreased">
<p>BMAA helped improve sleep quality and reduce the distress caused by nightmares.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2024-chiu-nightmare-lucid-dream.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">Improving interoceptive ability to reduce internet addiction tendency</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2024 · Mou, S.-C.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2024-mou-internet-addiction.png" alt="Internet addiction tendency decreased">
<p>BMAA significantly reduced internet addiction tendency.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2024-mou-internet-addiction.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">Effects of BMAA on interoception, alexithymia, and empathy among adults with high autistic traits</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2024 · Yang, C.-J.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2024-yang-autistic-traits.png" alt="Expression recognition">
<p>BMAA helped adults with high autistic traits better understand and recognize other people’s emotions.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2024-yang-autistic-traits.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">A preliminary study of a camp-based dynamic contemplative course on children’s sustained attention and balance</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2023 · Yeh, C.-W., Lien, Y.-W., Chen, R.-Y., Chuang, P.-Y., Cheng, W.-H., & Chen, H.-L.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2023-yeh-camp-attention-balance.png" alt="Six-day camp-based BMAA improvement summary">
<p>A six-day camp-based BMAA course improved children’s balance and attention.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2023-yeh-camp-attention-balance.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">Brief mindfulness guidance reduces implicit gender stereotypes during reading</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2023 · Hung, P.-Y., Chen, Y.-Y., & Yeh, L.-H.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2023-hung-gender-stereotype.png" alt="Stereotype interference">
<p>Short-term training with BMAA-derived techniques made readers less likely to have their reading comprehension disrupted by gender stereotypes.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2023-hung-gender-stereotype.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">Effects of a short-term dynamic body-mind awareness course on teachers’ stress and resilience</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2020 · Weng, W.-T.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2020-weng-teachers-stress-resilience.png" alt="Teachers' perceived stress decreased">
<p>BMAA helped elementary school teachers reduce stress and negative emotions and improve their capacity to recover from stress.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2020-weng-teachers-stress-resilience.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">Effects of a two-week BMAA practice on emotion regulation among university students</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2020 · Hsu, W.-C.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2020-hsu-emotion-regulation.png" alt="Depression decreased">
<p>Short-term BMAA helped university students reduce depression tendency and emotion-regulation difficulties.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2020-hsu-emotion-regulation.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">Feel your body: short-term in-class dynamic contemplative practice for children</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2019 · Lee, M.-N.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2019-lee-feel-your-body.png" alt="Breathing relaxation strategy increased">
<p>BMAA-C may help children use helpful strategies such as breathing relaxation and thinking from a different perspective when they feel upset.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2019-lee-feel-your-body.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">BMAA and integrated activity training for improving children’s executive function and emotion regulation</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2018 · Chang, Y.-J.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2018-chang-children-executive-emotion.png" alt="Working-memory span increased">
<p>Children’s BMAA improved the trained children’s brain power, especially working memory.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2018-chang-children-executive-emotion.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">An initial exploration of body-mind interaction: effects of BMAA on body sensation, working memory, and attentional control</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2017 · Lee, S.-Y.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2017-lee-body-mind-interaction.png" alt="Cognitive improvement after BMAA-C">
<p>Children’s BMAA helped children improve brain power and attention.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2017-lee-body-mind-interaction.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

::: {.study-card}
<div class="study-card-body">
<p class="study-card-title">What Confucius practiced is good for your mind: contemplative practice and executive functions</p>
<p class="study-card-meta">2016 · Teng, S.-C., & Lien, Y.-W.</p>
<img class="study-card-cover" src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2016-teng-confucius.png" alt="Working-memory capacity increased">
<p>Short-term BMAA improved trainees’ brain power, especially working memory.</p>
<p><a class="study-card-link" href="2016-teng-confucius.qmd">Read study summary</a></p>
</div>
:::

:::
